averageHdl - Variable in class com.txstate.bloodhound.model.AnalyticsResult
Mean HDL across records with HDL measurements.
averageHeartRate - Variable in class com.txstate.bloodhound.model.AnalyticsResult

averageSystolic - Variable in class com.txstate.bloodhound.model.AnalyticsResult

averageTotalCholesterol - Variable in class com.txstate.bloodhound.model.AnalyticsResult

averageTriglycerides - Variable in class com.txstate.bloodhound.model.AnalyticsResult
